description: Descope is an identity and access management platform for adding authentication, access control, and identity management to customer applications, partner applications, AI agents, and MCP servers. It provides CIAM features such as passwordless login, SSO, MFA, user management, and agent-oriented authorization.
summary: Descope exposes a documented REST API with an OpenAPI spec, a hosted remote MCP server at `https://mcp.descope.com`, and two CLIs (`descope` and `create-descope-app`).

packages.runtimeHint: download binary or build from source
